creator: lorenz.glimann@stud.uni-goettingen.de
text:
same issue with numpy in python-3.5 and python-3.6

OS: FreeBSD glorBSD 11.0-RELEASE-p8

Collecting numpy
  Downloading numpy-1.13.3.zip (5.0MB)

    with pip instead of using `setup.py install`:

      - `pip install numpy`   (last NumPy release on PyPi)
